title: lappula deflexa
intro: Lappula deflexa, also known as the deflexed lappula, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is native to certain regions in Europe and Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lappula deflexa include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Lappula deflexa are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
